chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-70 of 2024 (Nisar Ahmed Bozdar Vs. SHO PS “C” Section Sukkur & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on M.A No. 743/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on MA No. 744/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024. None for the applicant. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application has impugned an order dated 10-01-2024 passed by learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge Sukkur, whereby he has acquitted the private respondents of the charge by resorting the provisions of section 265-K Cr.P.C. The Acquittal of the any person charge for an offence could be challenged by an aggrieved person by preferring an Acquittal Appeal and not by way of making an application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C; as such same being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
